![](https://sultanxpress.ca/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/bg2.jpg)

## Catering Services  For All Your Events

![](https://sultanxpress.ca/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/breakline.png)

Are you hosting a dinner party this weekend and clueless about what to serve? Do you have a packed schedule and no time to cook because of this?

Well, SultanXpress is here to save the day! Our catering services & exotic dishes are sure to leave everyone in a food coma.

**Exotic Foods And Bursts Of Flavors Coming Your Way!**

SultanXpress has an eye for perfection. This reflects in our flavors and services as well. From the presentation to timely delivery and prices, all are tailor-made to fit your needs.

![](https://sultanxpress.ca/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/img3.jpg)

We cook our food from scratch. Our chefs come from Persian, Mediterranean, and Middle Eastern backgrounds, thus offering you authentic flavors and meals that you can enjoy.

From kebabs, stews, side orders, skewers, and more, all are made in our clean and hygienic kitchen. That’s not all, we also make traditional dishes – so if you are craving for some Baba Ganoush you had when you visited your Lebanese friend or the Baklava you tasted at the sweet shop across the street, we can cater to making it all.

**That’s Not All, Our Prices Are Affordable**

Most catering services add on hidden charges, but at SultanXpress we don’t do that. Our prices are upfront, light on the pocket, and transparent.

![](https://sultanxpress.ca/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Halal-Catering-in-Mississauga-576x1024.jpg)

![](https://sultanxpress.ca/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Persian-Halal-Catering-576x1024.jpg)

**Our Delivery Services – Quick & Free!**

To ease your worries, we offer delivery and it is FREE! You don not need to spend extra for delivery or step outside to pick up the food from our outlet. We will deliver it to your doorstep hot and fresh and at the exact time provided by you. Your guests will not have to wait for the food to be served – we will make sure it’s on the table at the time scheduled!

**The Areas We Serve Near You**

We offer our catering services in Etobicoke, Mississauga, Oakville, Milton, and Toronto. This includes residential areas & commercial facilities as well. Whether it is a dinner party at home or an office dinner with a middle eastern theme, we have got you covered.

**Place Your Order Today!**

So, what are you waiting for? Call us at **905-361-3999** and place your order right away. Whether it is Persian food, Mediterranean salads, or Middle Eastern sweets, we will have it at your doorstep right away.

SultanXpress is the premier halal catering service in Mississauga, Ontario, offering unforgettable halal menus, exceptional customer service, and free delivery within the neighborhood. From [event and corporate catering](https://sultanxpress.ca/corporate-catering-in-mississauga/) to personalized gatherings, our dedicated team ensures a seamless and memorable experience for every occasion. Discover the SultanXpress difference and let us exceed your expectations with our exceptional halal catering services.

1100 Dundas St. W.,

Mississauga, ON, Canada

[VIEW ON MAP](https://goo.gl/maps/iVgNQiFa5ixyoLu18)

[(905) 361-3999](tel:(905) 361-3999)

Menus

## ABOUT US

Welcome to Molinaro's Catering. We are a premier catering company offering our services in Mississauga and the surrounding areas. With both casual and sophisticated food options we are able to cater an expansive array of affairs. From extravagant weddings to small backyard get-togethers, our catering consultants work closely with you to ensure your vision is brought to life.

​

It is safe to say that food is our passion – eating it, creating it, and serving it to you! Everything on our menu is prepared using the freshest ingredients and we aim to support local markets whenever possible. If you find yourself overwhelmed by our comprehensive menu please do not hesitate to contact us. Having catered a wide range of events in the past, we are more than happy to provide you with suggestions and we look forward to helping you narrow down your menu ideas.

![Take Away Bag](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/11062b_83f71caad0a2410ea063611874920c3f~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_442,h_456,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/11062b_83f71caad0a2410ea063611874920c3f~mv2.jpg)

## Catering Packages

We have a variety of packages and party trays for you to choose from, depending on your needs.

_(minimum 25 persons required)_.

Click on the images to check out the details of our packages and menu.

[![](http://www.almustafacatering.com/images/g6.jpg)](http://www.almustafacatering.com/catering.html)[$1099\*](http://www.almustafacatering.com/catering.html)

**[Catering Packages](http://www.almustafacatering.com/catering.html)**

Best for smaller gatherings, and budget friendly.

\*Package starting price, minimum 25 persons

[![](http://www.almustafacatering.com/images/g4.jpg)](http://www.almustafacatering.com/wedding.html)[$1599\*](http://www.almustafacatering.com/wedding.html)

**[Special Events & Wedding Package](http://www.almustafacatering.com/wedding.html)**

We have a Silver, Gold and Diamond Package. Great for large parties.

\*Package starting price, minimum 50 persons

[![](http://www.almustafacatering.com/images/g5.jpg)](http://www.almustafacatering.com/trays.html)[$40\*](http://www.almustafacatering.com/trays.html)

**[Party Trays](http://www.almustafacatering.com/trays.html)**

A perfect accompaniment to your existing menu, or to add a little extra for popular dishes.

\*Tray starting price, small & large prices vary

[![](http://www.almustafacatering.com/images/g7.jpg)](http://www.almustafacatering.com/italian.html)[$50\*](http://www.almustafacatering.com/italian.html)

**[Italian Party Trays](http://www.almustafacatering.com/italian.html)**

Add something different to your catering package with one of our Italian trays.

\*Tray starting price, small & large prices vary

### Contact Us

We are happy to serve you and your guests, and provide you with the best service.

For more information, questions or comments, or simply to place your order, please contact us at

#### 647 710 8799

## Sprouts Catering Menu

### Let Sprouts handle the catering for your next office lunch, business meeting, or staff party. We’ve been serving fresh, healthy lunch to local companies for over 8 years. We want people to eat well, work better, live a healthier life style and feel good about themselves.

Water $2.00 / Pop $2.00 / Sparkling Water $2.50 / Flow Water $2.75 / Iced Tea $3.00 / Juice $3.00

Boxed Lunches

Individually boxed and labelled $16.49 pp

- pressed sandwiches served with house salad – add $2 for gluten free bread
- whole wheat wraps served with kettle cooked chips
- fresh salads served with multigrain roll

Conditions / Payment

- 8 person minimum
- orders must be placed & confirmed 24 hours in advance
- please allow 15 minutes before or after the requested delivery time
- prices are subject to change without notice
- prices are subject to applicable taxes
- payment: visa, master-card, american express
- $10 flat rate delivery fee within winston churchill, mavis, steeles and britannia

web.markdown:
# Catering Services Mississauga & Fresh Meal Specials for Every Occasion in Canada

At **Patti’s Food**, we believe that great food makes any event memorable. Whether you’re hosting a corporate gathering, a wedding, or a casual family celebration, our **[Corporate Catering Mississauga](https://pattisfood.com/specials/ourcatering/) services** and **fresh food specials** are designed to delight. Serving **Ontario** and beyond, we pride ourselves on offering **homemade meals** made from only the finest ingredients. In this guide, you’ll learn all about our catering services, the special deals we offer, and how our food can elevate your event in **Canada**.

## Why Choose Patti’s Food for Your Catering Needs?

Our commitment to quality and service sets us apart in the **food catering industry in Canada**.

- **Expertise in Catering**: With over **35 years of experience** in the food service industry, our team has mastered the art of catering to various events, ensuring that each dish is prepared with care and precision.
- **Fresh and Locally Sourced Ingredients**: Our focus is on using **fresh, locally sourced ingredients**, providing your guests with wholesome and flavourful meals.
- **Tailored Menus:** We recognize that each event has its own distinct needs.That's why our menus are fully customizable, from corporate events to intimate gatherings. We accommodate a variety of dietary preferences, such as vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and halal options.
- **Delivery Across Canada**: No matter where you are in **Ontario** or other Canadian provinces, we offer reliable delivery and on-site services to ensure that your event runs smoothly.

## Our Catering Specials - Delicious Deals for Every Occasion

At **Patti’s Food**, we offer special deals on our catering services to ensure you get great value without compromising on quality. From **family gatherings** to **corporate functions**, we have something for every type of event.

### Corporate Catering Deals

If you're planning a **business meeting** or **corporate event**, our corporate catering packages are the perfect choice. We offer:

- **Buffet-style catering** for large gatherings, with a variety of fresh salads, sandwiches, wraps, and hot entrees.
- **Healthy, balanced options** for health-conscious teams.
- **Freshly brewed coffee** and a selection of pastries to keep your team fueled all day.

We understand the importance of timely delivery, and our team ensures that your order arrives fresh and on time, with everything ready to serve.

### Wedding & Special Event Catering

Our gourmet catering options add elegance and flavor to weddings and special events. Our menu includes:

- **Custom-designed plated meals** for fine dining experiences.
- **Buffet-style setups** for large groups, with an emphasis on fresh ingredients and varied options.
- **Seasonal specials** featuring our signature BBQ and grilled dishes for outdoor events.

We also offer **dessert tables** with freshly baked treats, from **cakes** to **pastries**, perfect for a sweet finish to your meal.

### Fresh Food Specials for Family Gatherings

When it comes to family gatherings, **Patti’s Food** ensures everyone leaves satisfied. Our family catering specials include:

- **Family-style platters**, loaded with generous portions of fresh salads, sandwiches, pasta, and more.
- **Weekend BBQ specials** with tender meats and perfectly grilled vegetables.
- **Comfort foods**, like hearty soups and stews, made fresh and served with love.

## Our Commitment to Quality and Freshness

At **Patti’s Food**, we understand that the foundation of great catering starts with **quality ingredients**. We are committed to providing the freshest food that not only tastes good but also nourishes. Our chefs focus on:

- **Homemade, authentic recipes** passed down through generations.
- **Locally sourced, fresh produce** from Canadian farms.
- **Only natural ingredients,** free from preservatives and artificial additives.

Every meal we serve is crafted with care, and every dish reflects our passion for good, healthy food.

## Get in Touch with Patti’s Food for Your Catering Needs

Ready to make your next event unforgettable with **Patti’s Food**? Our team is here to help you select the perfect menu, cater to your specific needs, and ensure your event is a hit. We are proud to serve the **Greater Toronto Area (GTA)** and beyond, bringing fresh, delicious meals to events across Canada.

### Book Our Catering Services Today!

If you’re ready to plan your next event or take advantage of our **fresh food specials**, don’t hesitate to get in touch. Our team is available to discuss your needs, answer any questions, and provide you with a customized quote for your catering event.

- **Call us**: 905-821-2835
- **Email us**: patti@pattisfood.com
- **Request a Quote**: [Contact Patti’s Food – Diner & Catering in Mississauga](https://pattisfood.com/specials/contact/)
- **Order Online**: [Patti's Food](https://pattis.online-menu.ca/)

## Conclusion: Patti’s Food - Serving Fresh, Homemade Meals Across Canada

Patti’s Food provides a variety of catering services and special offers, perfect for corporate luncheons, wedding receptions, or casual gatherings with friends. From **homemade meals** to **fresh food specials**, we bring the best to your table. Trust us to make your next event unforgettable with high-quality food and exceptional service.

![Catering Mississauga](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/3464b8_8ec3d6bb674d410180f5624d9d20052a~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_208,h_227,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/ACS_0105_edited.jpg)

# Now Offering Home Delivery

Stock up on prepared foods to heat and serve for your family!

4 day shelf life or easy to freeze

Our experienced drivers take extra care in delivering your order to your doorstep

Orders to be placed minimum 24 hours in advance

​New Menu Items Added Weekly

Minimum 4 Servings ...$55.80

Additional Servings ...$13.95

Order 6 Servings and receive FREE Gourmet Cookies

​

##### HEAT & SERVE MENU

##### ​

Chicken or Veal Parmesan

Lightly Breaded Cutlets baked in Tomato Sauce and topped with Mozzarella Cheese.

Served with Penne Marinara, Caesar Salad with Dressing and Garlic Toast.

Spaghetti and Meatballs

Homemade Jumbo Italian Meatballs with Spaghetti Pasta in Tomato Sauce.

Served with Caesar Salad with Dressing and Garlic Toast.

​

Chicken Marsala

Boneless Chicken Breast sautéed with Mushrooms, Onions and Herbs in a Marsala Wine Sauce.

Served with Rigatoni in a Creamy Pesto Sauce, Garden Salad with Dressing and Garlic Toast.

​

Grilled Chicken & Pasta Alfredo

Herbal Grilled Chicken Breast served with sautéed Italian Vegetables.

Served with Bowtie Pasta in a Creamy Romano Cheese Sauce.

Garden Salad with Dressing and Garlic Toast.

​

Greek Chicken & Gyro Combo

Baked Oregano Chicken Breast & Sliced Gyro.

Served with Rice Pilaf, Greek Salad with Feta and Dressing, Pita Breads & Tzatziki Dip

​

First Delivery is FREE, $10 Delivery Charge, FREE Pick Up, FREE Delivery with $100 Orders

​

Call: 905-820-9944
